title: plantago coronopus var. serraria
intro: Plantago coronopus var. serraria, also known as buck's-horn plantain, is a variety of the broad-leaved plantain plant, characterized by its serrated leaves. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of buck's-horn plantain include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Buck's-horn plantain can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
